body:
## What

Two small changes to the chat input turn-status **preview pill**:

**Styling** (`chatTurnPills.css`)
- Side padding on the primary label is now **4px right / 2px left** (was `0 8px`).
- Added `box-sizing: border-box` to `.chat-turn-pill-preview` — the element that carries the `border` — so the border no longer grows the pill past its intended size.
- The resource label's file-icon glyph (`.monaco-icon-label::before`) is now a fixed **12px wide / 18px tall**.

**Behavior** (`chatTurnPills.ts` + consumers)
- Turn preview is now restricted to **markdown files only**. `previewKind` no longer classifies `.html`/`.htm`, `IPreviewFile.kind` narrows to `'markdown'`, and `openChatPreviewFile` drops the integrated-browser branch. HTML files no longer surface a preview pill or per-row preview action.

## Why

Aligns the preview pill with the intended spacing/sizing spec and limits preview to the markdown case (HTML preview via the integrated browser is being removed here).

## Notes for reviewers

- The `ChangesAndPreview_Html` component fixture was removed and related comments updated; the remaining turn-pills screenshot baselines will need regenerating in CI since padding/icon sizing changed.
- Validated with `tsgo` type-check, eslint, and the precommit hygiene check — all clean.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

reviews.body:
## Pull request overview

This PR makes two small, focused adjustments to the chat input turn-status **preview pill**. It refines the pill's spacing/sizing to match the intended spec, and narrows the preview feature to markdown files only, removing the integrated-browser HTML preview path. The changes are localized to the `chatTurnPills` widget, its content part, one sessions consumer (unchanged but type-compatible), the CSS media file, and a screenshot fixture.

**Changes:**
- Restrict turn preview to markdown: `previewKind` no longer classifies `.html`/`.htm`, `IPreviewFile.kind` narrows to `'markdown'`, and `openChatPreviewFile` drops the `BrowserViewCommandId.Open` branch (removing the now-unused import and `Codicon.globe` usage).
- Update preview-pill CSS: add `box-sizing: border-box`, change primary-label padding to `0 4px 0 2px`, and fix the file-icon glyph to 12px x 18px.
- Remove the `ChangesAndPreview_Html` component fixture and refresh related doc comments.

<details open>
<summary>Show a summary per file</summary>

| File | Description |
| ---- | ----------- |
| `src/vs/workbench/contrib/chat/browser/widget/chatTurnPills.ts` | Narrows preview types to markdown, drops the integrated-browser branch and its import/icon; JSDoc updated accordingly. |
| `src/vs/workbench/contrib/chat/browser/widget/chatContentParts/chatTurnPillsPart.ts` | Comment-only update reflecting markdown-only row preview action. |
| `src/vs/workbench/contrib/chat/browser/media/chatTurnPills.css` | Adds `box-sizing`, adjusts label padding, and sizes the file-icon glyph (12px x 18px). |
| `src/vs/workbench/test/browser/componentFixtures/chat/chatTurnPills.fixture.ts` | Removes the HTML-only fixture and updates fixture comments. |
</details>

## Review details

- **Files reviewed:** 4/4 changed files
- **Comments generated:** 1
- **Review effort level:** Medium

title: chat: update preview pill styling and restrict preview to markdown
